questionHtml: State what the result in part (f)(ii) tells us when considering this equation x4-9x3+24x2+22x-12=0.
markschemeHtml:
p2>2q 81>2×24  (so) nothing can be deduced         R1

 

Note: Do not allow FT for the R mark.

 

[1 mark]
